summary: A Go-based orchestration tool leveraging MCP for agent coordination with a heavy emphasis on assertion validation and extensive extra testing.
concerns: high volume of agent-generated extra test patches suggests unstable test coverage
stale worktree recovery patches indicate flaky orchestration logic
many handoff prompts marked completed implies coordination overhead
suggestions: consolidate extra test patches into the main test suite to reduce maintenance burden
stabilize the runner and MCP handler logic before adding more agent-generated tests
investigate root cause of stale worktree recoveries to prevent future cleanup chores
